movie.title: House of Flying Daggers (2004) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Chinese] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: In 9th century China, a corrupt government wages war against a rebel army called the Flying Daggers. A romantic warrior breaks a beautiful rebel out of prison to help her rejoin her fellows, but things are not what they seem.
